0.text: Nodules up to 6 mm in the superior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

1.text: Ground glass density nodules in the basal segments of both lower lobes

2.text: Nodules measuring 4 mm in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Nodules measuring 4 mm in diameter in the posterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung

4.text: Nodules measuring 3-4 mm in diameter in the middle lobe of the right lung

5.text: Nodules measuring 5.5 mm and 4 mm in diameter in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

6.text: Mild pleuroparenchymal density increases in the subpleural regions at the apex of both lungs
